name: First Western Financial Inc
business: First Western Financial Inc provides a fully integrated suite of wealth management services on its private trust bank platform, including deposit, loan, trust, wealth planning and investment management products and services. The company targets successful entrepreneurs, professionals, high net worth individuals and families, along with their businesses and philanthropic organizations, primarily in Colorado, Arizona, Wyoming, Montana, and California.
sellsTo: high net worth individuals and families
affluent markets in Colorado, Arizona, Wyoming, Montana, and California

exposures.sentence: The development and use of AI presents risks and challenges that may adversely impact the Company’s business.

The occurrence of fraudulent activity, breaches of our information security, and cybersecurity attacks could adversely affect our ability to conduct our business, manage our exposure to risk or expand our businesses, result in the disclosure or misuse of confidential or proprietary information, increase our costs to maintain and update our operational and security systems and infrastructure, and adversely impact our results of operations, liquidity and financial condition, as well as cause legal or reputational harm.
